headline: Vistra (VST) Expands Virtual Power Plant in Texas With Enphase Energy (ENPH)
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the cheap stocks that will go to the moon according to Reddit. On March 5, Vistra announced an expansion of its residential virtual power plant/VPP in Texas by integrating Enphase Energy’s (NASDAQ:ENPH) IQ Batteries into its Battery Rewards program. Managed through its flagship retail brand, TXU Energy, this initiative […]
